notes:
Siêu nhân means superhero — a person with special powers who saves people or fights evil (like Superman, Spider-Man). It’s a countable noun: một siêu nhân, hai siêu nhân; classifier: một siêu nhân (người is possible but usually omitted).

It can also be used jokingly for someone very capable, like “a superhuman” who handles everything easily.  

Strong memory link: anh hùng = hero (more general, no superpowers).
exampleSentences: Em trai anh rất thích xem phim về siêu nhân vào cuối tuần.
Nếu chị có siêu nhân giúp đỡ, mọi việc sẽ dễ dàng hơn nhiều.
Bọn trẻ thường mơ ước trở thành siêu nhân để cứu thế giới.
exampleSentencesTranslated: My younger brother really likes watching movies about superhero on weekends.
If you had a superhero to help, everything would be much easier.
Children often dream of becoming a superhero to save the world.
notes_md:
**Siêu nhân** means *superhero* — a person with special powers who saves people or fights evil (like Superman, Spider-Man). It’s a countable noun: **một siêu nhân, hai siêu nhân**; classifier: **một siêu nhân** (người is possible but usually omitted).

It can also be used jokingly for someone very capable, like “a superhuman” who handles everything easily.  

Strong memory link: **anh hùng** = hero (more general, no superpowers).
